easyStandard.skull: -X. X is half the number of cards in your hand (rounded up).
easyStandard.cultist: -X. X is the number of revealed Enchanted Woods locations.
easyStandard.tablet: -2. If you fail and this is an attack or evasion attempt against a swarming enemy, add 1 swarm card to it.

hardExpert.skull: -X. X is the number of cards in your hand.
hardExpert.cultist: -X. X is the number of revealed _Woods_ locations.
hardExpert.tablet: -2. If this is an attack or evasion attempt against a swarming enemy, add 1 swarm card to it.

label.stepBack: Step back and watch this surreal scene play out.
label.interrupt: Interrupt the scarred cat and handle this yourself.

label.testWillpower: Test {'{'}willpower{'}'} (3) to remember that this is all a dream
